name: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services
description: China's Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services, jointly issued by CAC, NDRC, MOST, MIIT, MPS, NRTA, and MoE. Effective 2023-08-15. Establishes obligations for providers of generative AI services in China (training data, content labeling, security assessments, algorithm registration).
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted generative AI services offered to the public in China.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI safety/governance regulation — first comprehensive Chinese GenAI regulatory framework.

license.notes: Government regulation; license terms vary by jurisdiction. Generally permitted for reference and citation; consult the specific issuer's terms before redistribution at scale.

lifecycle.notes: Issued jointly by CAC, NDRC, MOST, MIIT, MPS, NRTA, and Ministry of Education. Effective 2023-08-15.

current_extraction.notes: English translation source HTML at c_1690898327029107.htm plus translation-of-web-page.txt. extract_genai_interim.py parses the English translation into per-article structured CSV/JSON (24 articles across 5 chapters).
